description: Fixed evaluation set for the sqlite-vec retrieval overhaul. Questions are drawn from the project's recent work areas (LanceDB removal, enrichment pipeline, Claude session hook, Firefox source, OTel stack, fine-tuning, build status, hippo vision). Used by the retrieval benchmark at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-retrieval-benchmark.md.

questions.question: Why did we replace LanceDB with sqlite-vec?
How does the enrichment pipeline run shell Claude and browser sources concurrently?
What fixed the Claude session hook PID problem?
How does the Firefox browser source send events to the daemon?
What runs in the OTel observability stack locally?
What is the north star vision for hippo?
How are secrets redacted before storage?
What is the schema version and what changed in v6?
How does hybrid retrieval combine vector and lexical scores?
What does the degraded-mode response from rag.ask look like?
